scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('data/projects.json','utf8')); const files=['assets/portfolio/about-heading.png','assets/portfolio/contact-heading.png','assets/portfolio/gallery-heading.png','assets/portfolio/works-heading.png',...p.flatMap(x=>(x.screenshots||[]))]; const missing=files.filter(f=>!fs.existsSync(f)); if(missing.length){console.error({missing}); process.exit(1)} console.log('assets ok')"
